exercises.name: Single Arm Reverse Grip Tricep Pulldown
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, ensure that the rollers are set above your head.

2.Also, don’t let the weights touch down in between every single repetition.

3.Have a soft knee bend and have your hips sit back.

4. As you contract the triceps, move the single handle attachment down to your side until your arm is straight. 

5.When you complete one side, complete the other hand.

exercises.name: Single Arm Side Press Up
exercises.description: Lie on your side with knees bent. Use your top arm to push your torso upward, working your oblique muscles.

exercises.name: Single Arm Trap 3 Raise
exercises.description:
1. When performing this exercise, there will be 2 movements. First will be squeezing your shoulder blades together, from there you'll raise your hand up in an angle to either 2 or 10 o'clock position.

2. Grab a dumbbell with one hand, then on an inclined bench, get into position with your body facing the ground and hand all the way down, arm straight. This will be your starting position.

3. Retract shoulders then raise your arm sideways all the way to 2 or 10 o'clock position. Then back to starting position.

4. Once completed the set on one side, repeat on the other.

exercises.name: Single Arm Tricep Pushdown
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright facing away from a cable system, with a hand holding the handle at head height, elbow bent, upright back position.

2.Push the handle down, keeping your shoulder steady.

3.Bend at the elbow, returning the cable to the start position.

4.Repeat. Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Single Arm Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.description:
1.Lean back and look up while holding the handle, allowing the elbow to face outwards.

2.Pull down at shoulder level, elbow facing outwards and away from the body.

3.Straighten your arm, returning the handle to the starting position.

4. Repeat. Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Single Led RDL with a Twist
exercises.description: Single Led RDL with a Twist

exercises.name: Single Leg Balance
exercises.description:
1. Start standing with feet shoulder-width apart. 

2. Keep your hips even, glutes active, and abdominals tense. 

3. Slowly raise one knee up towards your chest without losing your balance or posture. Hold this position for a moment. 

4. Return back to the start position.

5. Repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Single Leg DB Hip Thrust
exercises.description: Single Leg DB Hip Thrust

exercises.name: Single Leg Down Dog to Climber
exercises.description:
From downward dog position, lift one leg toward the ceiling while keeping your hips square. 

This exercise stretches the hamstrings and engages the core.

exercises.name: Single Leg Dumbbell Hip Thrust (Full Tutorial) - Glute Exercises for Beginners
exercises.description: Single Leg Dumbbell Hip Thrust (Full Tutorial) - Glute Exercises for Beginners

exercises.name: Single Leg Dumbbell Hip Thrusts
exercises.description: Single Leg Dumbbell Hip Thrusts

exercises.name: Single Leg Frog Stretch
exercises.description:
1. Start on your hands and knees on the mat.

2. Fully extend one leg out to the side, and drop down to your elbows on the mat. 

3. Sit your hips back towards your foot until you get a gentle stretch in the groin and hips. 

4. Breathe and relax in this position.

5. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Single Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.description:
1) For this exercise, lie on your back. Keep your tummy tight and squeeze your glutes to lift. 

2) Start with one leg off the ground and held above your body. 

3) Throughout the exercise, try to keep your hips even.

exercises.name: Single Leg Glute Bridge with Single Arm Chest Press
exercises.description:
Lie on your back on the floor. Place one foot flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in the hand opposite that foot. 

As you drive your hips upward into a single-leg glute bridge, lift the other leg and bend it into a knee-drive position. At the same time, press the dumbbell overhead. 

Lower your hips and dumbbell back to the floor and repeat, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Single leg glute bridge with single arm press
exercises.description:
Lie on your back with one knee bent and foot flat on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in the hand on the same side as the grounded leg at chest level, palm facing forward. 

The opposite arm (same side as the raised leg) rests on the floor for support. Raise the opposite leg (same side as the supporting arm) with a bent knee, keeping it off the floor. 

Press through your grounded heel to lift your hips into a glute bridge, forming a straight line from shoulders to knees. 

From this position, press the dumbbell straight up until your arm is fully extended, then lower it back to chest level while maintaining your hips lifted, the raised leg in position, and the supporting arm on the floor.

exercises.name: Single Leg Glute Stretch
exercises.alternateName: knee to chest glute and hamstring stretch
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on your back on the mat with both legs fully extended.

2. Draw one knee in towards your body and gently pull that knee inwards until you feel a gentle stretch in your glute. 

3. Keeping the opposite leg fully extended, breathe and relax in this position. 

4. Repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Single Leg RDL Reach to Hop
exercises.description:
Stand on one leg with a slight bend in the knee. While keeping the core engaged, hinge at the hips into a single-leg Romanian deadlift (RDL) reach, lowering the arm opposite to your standing leg toward the floor as your non-standing leg extends behind you. 

Push through the standing leg to return upright, then immediately perform an explosive hop off the same leg

exercises.name: Single Leg Skater squat
exercises.description: Perform a single-leg squat, reaching your arms forward for balance, and alternate legs as you squat down.

exercises.name: Single Leg Skater Squat to Knee Lift
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing on one leg. 

2. Reach the opposite leg backwards, while descending into the hips and knee of the standing leg. 

3. Keeping the hips in line with the knees and ankle, push yourself back up to the starting position. 

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Single Seated Leg Press
exercises.description: Sit with one foot on the platform, back flat and core braced. Push through the heel to extend the leg without locking the knee. Slowly return with control.

exercises.name: Single Side Wide Bird Dog
exercises.description:
From an all-fours position, extend one arm forward and the opposite leg backward. 

Keep your back flat and engage your core. This helps with balance, stability, and core strength.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge Hold with Leg Drop
exercises.alternateName: single leg hip bridge hold with moving leg
exercises.description:
Lie on your back with one foot flat on the floor and the other leg extended straight up. 

Press through the foot on the floor to lift your hips into a single-leg glute bridge, keeping your core engaged and body in a straight line from shoulders to knee. 

Slowly lower the elevated leg toward the floor without letting your hips drop, then return it to the starting position. Repeat the movement for the desired reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Landmine RDL
exercises.description: Single-Leg Landmine RDL

exercises.name: Sissy Squat
exercises.description: Sissy Squat

exercises.name: Sissy Squat Correct Form | Gareth Sapstead
exercises.description: Sissy Squat Correct Form | Gareth Sapstead

exercises.name: Sit To Squat Jump
exercises.description:
Sit down on a bench or low surface, then explode upward into a squat jump. Land softly and repeat. 

This builds explosive power in the legs and enhances agility.

exercises.name: Skater
exercises.description:
1) Jump side to side on one foot. 

2) Make sure your back foot doesn’t touch the ground.

exercises.name: Ski Erg
exercises.description: Stand tall and pull handles down in a strong motion, hinging slightly at the hips. Reset arms to the top and repeat.

exercises.name: Ski Erg Butterfly
exercises.description: Use the Ski Erg handles in a circular motion like a butterfly stroke. Engage your lats and triceps with each rep.

exercises.name: Ski Jumpers
exercises.description: Jump side to side in a skiing motion, landing softly with bent knees.

exercises.name: Skull crusher glute bridge
exercises.description: Band around knees , feet wider then hips. Keep tension in the band.

exercises.name: Skull crusher w/ glute banded bridge
SL DB adduction slide
exercises.description: This will work with a DB or a plate. use the towel under is to lessen friction.
